---
title: "Data management and manipulation"
description: >
  Learn how to use simple and efficient tools for data management and
  manipulation, including functions to clean, transform, and format
  datasets using popular data-handling methods.
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Data management and manipulation}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
options(tibble.print_min = 4L, tibble.print_max = 4L)
```

```{r setup}
library(dta)
```
